Licensed Massage Therapist

Maria Her

Healing Through Touch · Dallas, TX

About

Dedicated to the Art of Healing

Dedicated massage therapist with over three years of experience crafting personalized treatments that restore balance and well-being. Skilled in a diverse range of modalities, Maria brings an intuitive, client-centered approach to every session.

Committed to advancing the profession, Maria is actively pursuing advanced training and aspires to become a CEU instructor, sharing her expertise with the next generation of therapists.

Specialties

Treatment Menu

☯

Swedish Massage

Flowing, rhythmic strokes to ease tension and promote deep relaxation throughout the body.

♦

Deep Tissue

Targeted pressure to release chronic muscle tension and restore range of motion.

✿

Aromatherapy

Essential oil-enhanced massage for holistic healing of body and mind.

◈

Hot Stone

Heated basalt stones placed along energy pathways to melt away stress and tension.

❤

Prenatal

Gentle, nurturing massage tailored to the unique needs of expecting mothers.

★

Sports Massage

Performance-focused treatment to enhance recovery and prevent injury.

Coming Soon

Becoming a CEU Instructor

Maria is actively working toward becoming a Continuing Education Unit instructor, dedicated to elevating industry standards and mentoring the next generation of massage therapists with advanced techniques and client-centered approaches.

Journey

Experience

Massage Therapist
Riviera Spa · Dallas, TX
Personalized treatment plans for a discerning clientele. Provided corporate chair massage for Boston Consulting Group. Over 80 returning clients year-to-date. Specializing in assisted stretching for deep relaxation and muscle tension relief.
Massage Therapist
Spa Habitat · Plano, TX
Client-focused approach with clear communication and professional standards. Wellness consultations to support ongoing client health goals.
Esthetician
Massage Envy · Oklahoma City, OK
Customized facial and body treatments with personalized home care recommendations for optimal results.
